skill_args_frontmatter_schema.signature: SKILL.md YAML frontmatter extension: args: [{name, type: 'string'|'choice'|'bool'|'multi-line'|'set-ref', description, required, default, choices?, maxLength?}]
skill_args_frontmatter_schema.description: Extended frontmatter schema for all 30 SKILL.md files. Modeled on GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch inputs. Capped at ~10 inputs per skill. Parsed once at startup into skill_catalog.

skill_catalog_service.signature: app/services/skill_catalog_service.py: def load_catalog() -> SkillCatalog; def get_skill(name) -> SkillMeta; def check_preconditions(name, project_state) -> PreconditionResult
skill_catalog_service.description: Service that parses SKILL.md frontmatter at startup, exposes metadata, validates preconditions (e.g. /execute-set requires a plan). Cached; reloads on file-watch in dev.

skills_catalog_endpoint.signature: GET /api/skills -> [{name, description, args: [...], categories: [...]}]; GET /api/skills/{name} -> full meta including preconditions against current project state
skills_catalog_endpoint.description: Frontend catalog endpoint. Agents tab renders gallery from this. Launch modal fetches per-skill meta to render form.

skill_launcher_component.description: React component + typed form generator. Renders typed inputs per arg schema (string, choice as dropdown, bool as switch, multi-line as textarea, set-ref as set picker from .planning/). Dedicated 'Skip discuss' toggle for applicable skills. Submits to POST /api/agents/runs from agent-runtime-foundation.

skill_gallery_page.signature: AgentsPage's 'Launch New Run' tab renders <SkillGallery /> with category filters (autonomous / interactive / human-in-loop)
skill_gallery_page.description: Gallery UI listing all dispatchable skills. Each card shows name, description, arg count, complexity hints. Click opens SkillLauncher modal.

sanitized_args_contract.signature: def sanitize_skill_args(skill_name, raw_args) -> sanitized_args; wraps string args in <user_input>...</user_input> tags; enforces maxLength per arg; rejects shell metacharacters in set-ref args
sanitized_args_contract.description: Server-side sanitization before args reach SDK. Prevents shell injection into agent prompt. Length limits per arg type. Server-controlled SDK options (args never translate to SDK option names).

precondition_check_endpoint.description: Pre-dispatch validation. Returns human-readable blockers (e.g. 'execute-set requires a plan'). Launcher disables Submit button and surfaces blockers inline.

run_dispatch_endpoint.description: Launcher posts to this endpoint after validating args

build_sdk_options.signature: build_sdk_options(project_root, worktree, skill_name, skill_args, run_id) -> ClaudeAgentOptions
build_sdk_options.description: The catalog service must pass skill_args in the shape build_sdk_options expects; skill_runner on the foundation side consumes them

skill_runner_contract.description: The args we sanitize here are consumed by foundation's skill_runner to construct the SDK prompt

args_never_shell_interpolated.description: User-supplied skill args are never shell-interpolated. Wrapped in <user_input> tags inside the prompt; passed to SDK via ClaudeAgentOptions, not as shell arguments.

arg_length_limits.description: String args capped at 4096 chars default; multi-line at 32768. Server rejects oversized submissions with 400.

preconditions_block_dispatch.description: If check-preconditions returns ok=false, the launcher disables Submit and dispatches cannot proceed. Server-side second check also rejects with 400 to handle race.

all_30_skills_in_catalog.description: Every SKILL.md in skills/ directory has args frontmatter (possibly empty args: []) and appears in the catalog. Missing frontmatter = CI failure.

frontmatter_schema_validated.description: Frontmatter is validated by a Zod-equivalent Python schema at startup. Invalid frontmatter = loud startup error, not silent omission.
